{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323175514C29F80CF33D3F6DB9D08"}"},"total":1715},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7442987237103338265","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"我觉得这本书怎么说呢？就一个字绝。嗷嗷嗷啊好喜欢这本书真的，每天都来瞅瞅看作者大大更新没有，喜欢男女主的性格就是那种非常nice的设定，男主他真的……超爱她呜呜呜呜，女主也是一个非常不错的女孩，就是那种很让人眼前一亮的女孩，真的不自觉的被吸引，还有其他人物设定也不错。
延栀有理必须锁死啊，虽然现在还没有在一起但是啊啊啊啊啊啊啊啊好甜好甜啊太喜欢了。入坑绝不亏快来看吧！
请允许我向您发出一个诚挚的邀请：一来看这本书吧！如果你们还没开始看这本书，赶快行动吧！真心推荐哦！🎉"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1732958650,"group_id":"7400687292576189465","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N5oZCOMUy513xEMnXoOkyECmvbJRtnfKqhGqovELquWf","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/07e75822717f41a3b24107ddb1acead9~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776788732&x-signature=JXFfRsJwtR3oROoj3nJQpj61LC8%3D","user_id":"1490544363320935","user_name":"吟几许"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1490544363320935","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7400687292576189465","book_info":{"abstract":"【豪门+娱乐圈+爽文+女配逆袭+甜宠1v1】
沈栀一朝被撕票，醒来发现自己穿成一本降智小说里的同名恶毒女配。
剧情一言概之：偏心的爸狠毒的妈，绿茶的妹妹和废柴的她。
而她身为男主的头号舔狗，因为爱而不得，最后成功把自己作死，下场凄惨。
-
开局就是恋综。
网友：【沈栀这舔狗都舔到节目上来了！烦不烦啊！】
然而面对给女主夹菜企图让她嫉妒的男主：
沈栀一脸嫌弃：“给人夹菜，得用公筷。”
“人体细菌最多的地方就是口腔，你不知道？”
网友：【……她这是嫉妒！】
面对帮女主搬行李搬得气喘吁吁的男主：
沈栀扛着行李箱健步如飞连跨几阶：“让让，挡路了。”
“我看你有点虚，需要帮忙吗？”
网友：【……她这是污蔑！】
节目后期——
网友QAQ：【……她不是装的，她是真癫啊！】
最后的最后——
网友沉默：【不是，你们管沈栀这样的全能大佬叫废柴？】
-
斗继母，虐继妹，父亲不爱又怎样。
首富外公一家争着抢着把她宠上天。
为了规避书中结局，沈栀活成娱乐圈里的一道泥石流。
然而没想到——
她躲开了男主，却被某个身份矜贵的男人盯上了。
入夜。
她的呜咽声尽数淹没。
男人的呼吸炽热滚烫：“栀栀，你只能是我的。”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/e30ce1ede79a6590522c6d4b4e2b06c2","author":"五月的海","author_id":"","book_id":"7400687292576189465","book_name":"恶毒女配手撕剧本，来啊，都别活","book_short_name":"灼夏心动","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#c8a0a8","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"4.1万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":745,"name":"星光璀璨","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=745&name=星光璀璨&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":3,"name":"现代言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=3&name=现代言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":96,"name":"甜宠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=96&name=甜宠&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":43,"name":"娱乐圈","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=43&name=娱乐圈&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":834,"name":"1v1","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=834&name=1v1&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7400687359420809753","read_count":"40729","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"622868"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.1","serial_count":"321","tags":"星光璀璨,现代言情,穿越,娱乐圈,甜宠,1v1","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2odb216f5888977a3b4254323dc37a9d6e~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779443714&x-signature=dMtwm41UbdJobISopTUM5ApagUQ%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"567770478545709","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"182"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323175514C29F80CF33D3F6DB9D08"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读5小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":8,"forwarded_cou
